description_long: This is a compact, rectangular cabinet with a light wood frame and smooth, flat surfaces. The front features two large, white doors with small, round keyholes, suggesting secure storage. The sides and top are finished in a natural wood grain, providing a subtle contrast to the white doors. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its clean, minimalist design makes it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways. The absence of visible handles gives it a sleek, modern appearance.
description: A compact, light wood cabinet with two white, lockable doors and a minimalist, handle-free design. The top and sides feature a natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, white doors framed by light wood, with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full height and depth of the cabinet, highlighting the natural wood grain finish.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing two white panels with small, round keyholes, indicating lockable compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the wood grain texture.
